hero.title: Turn Novels into Scalable Animation.
hero.subtitle: Use a complete AI industrial system, not scattered tools.
hero.description:
Super Caterpillar converts text content into deliverable, controllable, and scalable animations
through multi-engine collaboration, structured assets, and automated production workflows.

value.title:
Not Just an AI Tool
A Complete Animation Production Line

v1.title: Structured Production
v1.desc: Novels, characters, and world views dismantled into computable production structures.

v2.title: Quality & Consistency
v2.desc: Auto QA, logic verification, and visual consistency mechanisms ensure stable delivery.

v3.title: Controllable Cost
v3.desc: Real-time visibility, predictability, and optimization of GPU/Model/Task costs.

process.title:
From Story to Film
Fully Automated Production Flow

s1.title: 01 Import & Analysis
s1.desc: AI deeply understands text, dismantling plot, characters, and world-view elements.

s2.title: 02 Script & Semantics
s2.desc: Auto-converts to standard production scripts, building an executable semantic space.

s3.title: 03 Shot & Lens Planning
s3.desc: Precisely plans shot size, movement, and composition to form renderable shot structures.

s4.title: 04 Asset Generation
s4.desc: Multi-engine batch generation of consistent assets into the reusable asset library.

s5.title: 05 Batch Video Generation
s5.desc: Clustered rendering and task scheduling for efficient animation clip generation.

s6.title: 06 Compositing & Export
s6.desc: Smart editing and post-processing to output the final deliverable film.

capabilities.title: Six Core Capabilities for Industrial Animation

c1.title: Visual Scene Graph
c1.desc: Intuitively present plot structure, relationships, and scene links to master complex narratives.

c2.title: Intelligent QA
c2.desc: System automatically identifies and blocks logic/visual errors without manual frame-by-frame checks.

c3.title: Multi-tier Management
c3.desc: Supports Organization/Project/Scene layering, adapted for large team collaboration and permissions.

c4.title: Multi-Engine Routing
c4.desc: Automatically selects the "most cost-effective and usable" solution to maximize unit output.

c5.title: Enterprise Security
c5.desc: Full IP control, traceability, and commercial viability, eliminating copyright and compliance risks.

c6.title: Cost & Efficiency
c6.desc: Real-time monitoring of every bit of compute usage to eliminate budget black holes.

platform.title: An Expandable AI Animation Platform
platform.subtitle:
All models, assets, and production tasks
are unified and orchestrated by the Engine system.

p1.title: Engine Universe
p1.desc: Core Scheduler: Unifies generation, analysis, repair, and evaluation engines for cross-model collaboration.

p2.title: Model Universe
p2.desc: Resource Pool: Replaceable, routable models supporting private fine-tuning and style customization.

p3.title: Asset Universe
p3.desc: Digital Asset Repository: Reusable character, scene, and style assets supporting long-term, cross-project production.

e2.title: Studios
e2.desc: Batch production, collaboration, quality & cost control.

footerCTA.title: Ready to Enter the AI Animation Industrial Age?

Projects.title: Projects
Projects.subtitle: Manage your cinematic universe productions
